info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: tatreyartyfcCItyarteH Sni gatO syAdfRAti tu ' (Slo. 30) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'alAtfRo vala indra vrajo goH purA hantorBayamAno vyAra' (f0 33010) vyAretyartervipUrvAlliwi rUpam svayameva vivftO baBUvetyarTaH
'ArcCati vA ezoKA yadBidyate' (Sa0 brA0 6648) ArcCati ArtimApnoti
'aNge aNga ArpitA utsitASca' (aTarva0 61123) ArpitA Arti prApitAH
'yaTA vAtena prakzIRA vfkzAH Sere nyarpitAH' (aTarva0 10315) nyarpitA nIcErgamitAH pAtitAH BugnAH
'pratyeva tizWati paryAriRI Bavati' (tE0 saM0 2147) paryAriRI prasavakAlamatItya kftaprasaveti BawwaBAskaraH
'paryAriRIti parihAsUrBavati' (satyA0 SrO0 2218) yA gOrgaBiRI satI prAptaM prasavakAlaM parityajya ciraM garBaM DftvA paScAtprasUyate sA paryAriRI
